meaning: n.短桨,橹,比赛用的小划艇vt.摇桨,用短桨或橹划vi.划船
examples: Did the scull have a cox?
Be careful not to use your lead arm to brace, or scull out front.
Wear Valley water boat anchor line, singing the crisp sound of soft scull .
For another, Scull made a fortune on works he had bought not too long before.
Except for pleasure boats and an occasional scull, traffic on it ceased long ago.
